barRaise.topFinding: The verdict holds at needs-attention but the reason rotated: the commit-per-patch hard rule reopened. v0.98.10 is fully authored (GDD pill v0.98.10 at line 1380, a complete changelog entry, and the footprint-rebalance code applied to source/world3d/building_catalog_3d.gd) yet sits uncommitted two days on, with HEAD and project.godot config/version both still v0.98.9, so the dirty GDD.html + project.godot (the FUSE-truncation-unacceptable files) stand exposed. The 2026-06-16 top action (one full 2D-residual GDD sweep) was skipped for this unrelated footprint change, which itself self-flags a balance review it has not had, and all three carried MEDIUMs (world_3d profiler baseline at ~9 cycles, the v0.80.1 stale ARCHITECTURE.md still cited as the code source of truth, and the GDD 2D-residual drift) are unchanged. Run release.ps1 to land v0.98.10, then the 2D sweep and the profiler baseline.

actions.title: Run `release.ps1` to commit + push the in-flight v0.98.10 so HEAD and `config/version` (0.98.9 -> 0.98.10) catch up to the GDD pill and the dirty `GDD.html` / `project.godot` / `building_catalog_3d.gd` stop sitting uncommitted. Re-closes the commit-per-patch hard rule.

Do the one-pass 2D-residual GDD sweep carried from 06-16 action #1: era-stamp the M3 roadmap deliverables (~2083-2087), re-point the frame-tick rows naming `connect_wave_director` / gameplay win-check (~4648/4726) and the tile-constant note (~4816), and re-point the three Design-tab Locked-Decision implementation pointers onto `world_3d.gd`.
Capture and log a `world_3d` profiler run at 1000-3000 enemies in `docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md` before gameplay drives the 3D crowd; carried ~9 cycles and now compounded by the footprint-density bump.

Refresh or retire `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` off its v0.80.1 / 2D-stack snapshot and stop the GDD citing it as the synced source if retired; resolve the `source/vfx/damage_number.gd(.uid)` tracked-vs-changelog contradiction in the same pass.

Run the balance review v0.98.10 self-flagged: confirm the v0.34.0 footprint-defense rule and the S-42 wall-enclosure flood-fill still hold with 14 buildings now 2x2+ and defense values left as authored.
